user.title: SMHI
user.description: Set up SMHI forecast. Home location is currently {home_latitude}, {home_longitude}. Disable Home location if you want to use custom coordinates.

confirm.title: Confirm SMHI setup

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure SMHI
reconfigure.description: Update coordinates or switch back to the Home Assistant Home location.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to SMHI. Try again later.
error.out_of_bounds: The coordinates are outside the valid SMHI forecast area.
error.unknown: Unexpected error while validating setup. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: SMHI is already configured for these coordinates.

init.title: SMHI options
init.description: Changes are applied by reloading the integration automatically.

data.enable_thermal_sensors: Enable thermal comfort sensors (3 comprehensive indices)
